mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS demandId, d.service_category_id AS serviceCategoryId, d.service_subcategory_id AS serviceSubcategoryId, d.crop_code AS cropCode, d.area_mu AS areaMu, d.lat AS lat, d.lng AS lng, d.requirement_json AS requirementJson FROM demand d WHERE d.id = #{demandId} AND d.status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'MATCHING', 'WAITING_FARMER_CONFIRM') LIMIT 1
